title: Hermes Agent + Mixture of Agents is insane…
summary: David Ondrej presents a video discussing the combination of Hermes Agent with Mixture of Agents architecture. The content focuses on running AI agents and includes resources, sponsorships, and promotional links.
writeup: This video from David Ondrej covers pairing the Hermes Agent with a Mixture of Agents architecture and walks through running the resulting AI agents. The relevance lies in multi-agent systems: combining a specific agent setup with a Mixture of Agents approach rather than relying on a single model. The video also includes resources and promotional links alongside the technical discussion.
